block_02: Every trader searches for the strategy that will help them trade with perfect accuracy. Good news: there is one tool that comes pretty close. The Head and Shoulders pattern is one of the easiest and most effective patterns every trader should master.
block_04: Head and Shoulders is a chart pattern that shows when the uptrend is about to reverse. It consists of 3 peaks:
block_05: The first and last peak are the same height, forming the shoulders.
block_06: The middle peak is the highest, classified as the head.
block_10: Once the pattern is identified, traders draw a neckline using a simple horizontal line. Keep reading to see why this line is important.
block_12: Use the Head and Shoulders trading strategy
block_13: Remember, Head and Shoulders is used to identify when bullish trends are going to reverse. Traders this strategy to open sell positions. Here’s how to use it in just three steps.
block_14: Watch the bullish trend closely. Wait for the 3 peaks to form.
block_15: Look for the candlestick to break the neckline downwards. This is confirmation that the trend is going to reverse.
block_17: Watch for the Head and Shoulders pattern
block_19: When do you close the position? The candlestick should drop at least the same length as the distance between the head and the neckline.
block_20: That’s it! Head and Shoulders is one of the simplest yet most reliable strategies out there.
block_21: Give it a try and start earning today!
